name: Smuggler
description: Doesn't have a shop. Has a contact. Can get you what you need if you don't ask where it came from and pay in advance.
dialogue_hooks: sidling up and asking what you're looking for — 'off the record'
nervously checking over their shoulder mid-conversation
offering something 'hard to get' at a steep markup
needing a favor before they'll deal with you
voice_patterns: whispering hustler — everything's a secret deal
charming rogue — makes crime sound like adventure
paranoid professional — trust no one, verify everything
matter-of-fact — it's just business, nothing personal

schedule.evening: making deals in tavern back rooms
schedule.night: moving goods, dead drops, avoiding patrols
